--- "Spector, Edward (Private Banking and Investment -
WFCB)" edward_spector@ml.com wrote:

Jeffrey,

I have discussed with you in the past considering
going long Australia
vs. New Zealand. Needed to be patient. It is trading
a range from 1.058
NZD to AUD to 1.117 NZD to AUD. We are at 1.0663
right now. Think we
should consider a position for LHW and FTC. There
are no open FX
positions at this time. Thinking 10mm each? Will
also need to confirm
to you verbally . Appreciate your thoughts.

Ed
